# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

We are committed to creating a welcoming and respectful environment for everyone.

Examples of positive behavior include:

- Being respectful
- Accepting constructive feedback
- Supporting other contributors
- Focusing on what is best for the community

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Discrimination
- Personal attacks
- Offensive comments

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, commits, code, issues, or other contributions that do not follow this Code of Conduct.
